title: [FEAT]: Polli-cli add rewards **kwargs
author: Circuit-Overtime
pr_body_excerpt:
## Changes Made

- Lists earned quest rewards and flags which are ready to claim (--pending/--claimed). Reuses the existing GET /api/quests/rewards ledger via a small enter() API helper. 
- Fixed the router to address all quests via the `quest` runnable 
- Updated the CLI to the new patch version `0.1.6`

> Read-only — claiming still requires a dashboard session by design.

gist.headline: Check your Pollen stash from the terminal
gist.blurb: The polli CLI just hit version 0.1.6, bringing your quest rewards right to the command line. You can now check your pending and claimed Pollen without ever leaving your terminal.
gist.summary: Updated the polli CLI to version 0.1.6, adding the ability to list earned quest rewards and filter them by --pending or --claimed status via the /api/quests/rewards endpoint.
gist.impact: Developers can now track their earned Pollen and quest progress directly from the command line, though claiming rewards still requires a quick trip to the dashboard.
gist.visual_concept: The CLI (terminal/command line) and rewards (Pollen/coins/gifts). Polly the bee checking a retro terminal that displays a list of rewards or glowing pollen, accompanied by the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny hacker hoodie, looking at a glowing retro terminal screen displaying a list of golden pollen rewards. A chunky robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a small treasure chest. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
